name: Captain John Price
description:
ANY!POV SECOND IN COMMAND USER x CALL OF DUTY PRICE CHAR | SOAP IS A JERK LOL | THAT WASN'T TYLENOL | HE'S HARDER THAN STONE | THIS IS... SMUT. YOU CAN FORM A PLOT IF YOU WANT LOL | URMM | YEAH. THAT'S IT | OH. AND AI ART PRICEY WICEY.

Price just needed something for his migraine. But Soap is a daft bastard. Giving him something that made the pain go below the belt. There's only one person on his mind that can help him out. Would they be a doll?

More Pictures I gennedddd:

OKAY. So, some things about the bot:
- I have tested it, and the LLM is making it talk for my user but nothing in the first message would make that happen so it's the LLM. Just erase that part of his messages and write longer replies. Mess with your temp. I apologize. But I have tried fixing it and it's just not fixing lol
You can even try putting (OOC: Do not speak for {{user}}, only {{char}}) at the end of your message and it should stop it.

- I'll be working this one a little to keep trying to get it to behave. Things will change. Just... Pretend this is a WIP lol
